chat.text: Hello! I am your FAQ assistant. How can I help you today?
You can update your registered bank account by submitting a request with the required documents.
There is no charge for updating your registered bank account.
You can update your contact details through the customer service portal or by submitting a request with valid proof.
Password resets can be performed using the 'Forgot Password' option available on the login page.
You can check your application status by logging into your account and visiting the Applications section.
Verification usually takes between 2 and 5 business days after all required documents have been submitted.
You can update your email address from your profile settings or by contacting customer support.
Customer support is available through the Help Center, email, or our customer care phone number during business hours.
If you forgot your username, please use the account recovery option or contact customer support for assistance.
Hi tell me about ICCI bank
